intent: NoJobs-filed emails contain real job listings. Fix extraction + Gemini prompt to detect/extract digest-format aggregator emails (Glassdoor/Indeed/Google Alerts). Reprocess misfiled threads.

Jobs use VML <v:roundrect> buttons not <a href> -> extractAnchorPairs returns []. Filed NoJobs.
evidence.google_alerts_19e9aa3adc7b13b7: clean structured plaintext, 10 real jobs (UKG/Accenture/Meta/Oracle). Should extract trivially. Filed NoJobs -> consistent with stale isJobListingEmail precheck (removed fea3cbe) processing before deploy. Needs reprocess.
